subcodes.first_line: This is what hath shone forth from the Dayspring of Will: O thou who art mentioned before the Face! We have hearkened unto thy call and have read [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ما اشرق من مطلع الاراده یا ایها المذکور بین یدی الوجه قد سمعنا ندآئک و قرء
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @importance of prayer
